name: 100,000 Calorie Bars
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix together the cake mix, melted butter, and 1/3 cup evaporated milk.
2. Spread half of this mixture in a 13x9-inch pan.
3. Bake at 350°F for 6 minutes.
4. Sprinkle chocolate chips and nuts on top of the baked mixture.
5. Melt caramels in milk.
6. Drizzle over the nuts and chocolate chips.
7. Pat remaining batter on top of the caramelized ingredients.
8. Bake for an additional 20 minutes.
